name: Iso8601

unions.name: Mode
unions.comment:
The precission of the resulting String can be defined by the Mode parameter

The resulting string will have the following format

  - Year: "YYYY"
  - Month: "YYYY-MM"
  - Day: "YYYY-MM-DD"
  - Hour: "YYYY-MM-DDThh"
  - Minute: "YYYY-MM-DDThh-mm"
  - Second: "YYYY-MM-DDThh-mm-ss"
  - Milli: "YYYY-MM-DDThh-mm-ss.sss"
  - HourOnly: "hh"
  - HourMinute: "hh-mm"
  - HourSecond: "hh-mm-ss"
  - HourMilli: "hh-mm-ss.sss"

values.name: toString
values.comment: Convert a posix time into a ISO8601 string

values.name: toUtcString
values.comment: Format a String without timezone offset
